slides.title: The Billion Dollar Mistake 💸
slides.content:
Historically, an empty variable (`null`) caused apps to crash.

Dart ensures safety. Regular variables **cannot** be empty. If you want a nullable variable, you MUST add a `?`.

slides.title: Nullable variables

quizData.question: What symbol specifies that a variable is allowed to be `null`?
quizData.explanation: Appending a `?` to the type allows it to hold a `null` value.
